text:
when non-root users try to connect to some irc server BitchX says them
'Unable to connect: Permission denied'
when i try non-root users try to ftp or telnet from my host it will be:
'ftp or telnet: <host to which i telnet> servname not supported by ai_socktype'

how can i fix this problem?

Thanks!
